name: The Fated General
overview: The Fated General is a Chinese historical drama about the heroic feats of a general who has never lost a battle. He is Huo Qu Bing, the son of a servant who ends up becoming a member of the imperial family. During a time when the people are forced to live through insufferable conditions and the constant threats from Xiong Nu, Huo Qu Bing takes up arms to become a celebrated warrior of the Han Dynasty.

trailers.title: Upcoming Chinese Historical Drama The Fated General 霍去病Huo Qu Bing
